data.page_content:
Welcome to the Divoom API

    
##### command description

- Enter custom display mode and accept custom commands for display.
DispList  supports the following display elements:
1: Text：up to six custom text display elements; 
2: Image：Up to ten image display elements; 
3: NetData：Up to six network requests; You can refer to the document“ https://docin.divoom-gz.com/web/#/5/145 ”
4: Time：　Time display ();
5: Date：Date display();
6: Weather: Weather display(Weather Must include a webp animation with 10 images, each representing a different type of weather, in the following order: sunny day，Cloudy day，Rainy day ,snow  day,Frog  day,sunny night ,Cloudy night ,Rainy night ,snow night ,Frog  night ); 
7: Temperature: Temperature display(Temperature);
8: MonYear: MonYear(2025-08);
9: Mday: Mday(the month day);
10:Year; 
11:Month;
12:Week;

##### Request URL
- ` http://IP:9000/divoom_api `
  
##### Request method
- GET 

##### para

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:----    |:----- |-----   |
|Command |string |Device/EnterCustomControlMode  |
|BackgroudImageAddr |string | Display base image, it will is url  and The resolution of the image must be 800 * 1280   |
|BackgroudImageLocalFlag |number | 1: "BackgroudImageAddr" will be a local file("/userdata/clock_bg.jpg");  0: it will be url file |
|DispList |Array | list     |
|->ID |number | Display element ID. If this ID has been added before, we will overwrite the previous element. Otherwise, it is a new element added, greater than 0     |
|->Type |string | It will be display element  |
|->StartX |number | Display the starting position x coordinate of the display area    |
|->StartY |number | Display the starting position y coordinate of the display area    |
|->Width |number | Display area width     |
|->Height |number | Display area height     |
|->Align |number | 0；left； 1：right; 2:middle     |
|->FontSize |number | Display font size, only text is valid     |
|->FontID |number | Display font ID, only text is valid     |
|->FontColor |string | #FFFFFF.     |
|->BgColor |string | #000000     |
|->Url |string | It is url address, Network request address or image download address.     |
|->RuleInfo |string | This is the data parsing rule for network requests, which can be referred to“ https://docin.divoom-gz.com/web/#/5/145 ”.     |
|->TextMessage |string | display content when type is "Text".     |
|->RequestTime |number | Network request interval time, in seconds, greater than 10  |
|->ImgLocalFlag |number | 1: "Url" will be a local file("/userdata/weather.gif");  0: it will be url file  |

#####  Request example 

#####  net file example 
{
    "Command":"Device/EnterCustomControlMode",
    "BackgroudImageLocalFlag":0,
	"BackgroudImageAddr": "https://f.divoom-gz.com/group1/M00/0C/53/rBAAM2faipuEYhJQAAAAAAsMG7w762.jpg",

##### respone example 

``` 
  {
    "ReturnCode": 0
  }
```

##### Return value 

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|ReturnCode |number   |0  |
